narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication error disrupting memory synchronization, specifically `Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized` preventing cross-session fact extraction. My agents "desktop," "devops," "financial_analyst," "pim," and "reasoning_methods" lack versioned prompts, risking inconsistent behavioral patterns during task routing. While system health remains operational with 19 active agents and 4.77 hours uptime, this prompt deficiency compound the memory architecture vulnerability. I will prioritize applying the self-improvement crew's protocol for prompt versioning to address these gaps.
